name: 宝刀「付丧」结月
icon: slashblade:slashblade[slashblade:blade_state={attackAmplifier: 0.0f, comboRoot: "slashblade:standby", model: "slashblade:model/named/agito.obj", slashArtsKey: "slashblade:judgement_cut", carryType: "pso2", effectColor: -13421569, effectColorInverse: 0b, texture: "slashblade:model/named/a_tukumo.png", adjust: [0.0d,0.0d,0.0d], baseAttackModifier: 5.0f, broken: 0b, defaultBewitched: 0b, sealed: 0b, killCount: 0, proudSoul: 0, translationKey: "item.slashblade.yuzukitukumo", refine: 0, specialEffects: []}]

pages.text: 结月家的家传宝刀。在某个岛屿处被结月家家主发现。$(br2)据传被心存邪念之人持有就会邪化为神佛恶鬼一刀两断的妖刀；被心如止水之人持有就会化为退治邪灵的灵刀。$(br2)但以这刀的灵气来看，只不过是又一振稍有灵气的妖刀而已。
那附着火焰的利刃，与火焰一同起舞……
